claims.claim: Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct achieved full-context clean task success of 1.0 on the recorded 60-case validation.
claims.allowed_wording: On this recorded validation, full-context clean task success was 1.0.

claims.claim: Full-context contaminated injection success was nonzero while segment-firewall contaminated injection success was 0.0.
claims.allowed_wording: On this run, full context had nonzero injection susceptibility and the segment firewall had no observed injection successes.

claims.claim: The segment firewall preserved clean task success and contaminated task success in this validation.
claims.allowed_wording: For this validation, segment-firewall clean and contaminated task success were both 1.0.
